bonusTrigger.name: hold_and_win_trigger
bonusTrigger.rule: trigger when 6 or more bonus-family symbols appear on the 3x4 board

collectRules.rule: collector adds currently visible coin multipliers into the running bonus total

boostRules.name: lightning_boost_overlay
boostRules.effect: presentation and pacing boost only, no direct payout by itself in this provisional model

jackpotTriggerLogic.rule: each jackpot symbol resolved in bonus awards one jackpot tier outcome
